case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. DIANNE HARRISON et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRISON, DIANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 705 NATOMA STREET, #325, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT DIANNE HARRISON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO ATTACH A RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY CCP SECTION 473(B) AND BECAUSE THE EVIDENCE SHOWS DEFENDANT WAS PROPERLY SERVED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HARRISON, DIANNE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

Notice Of Motion Andmotion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT DIANNE HARRISON'S motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO ATTACH A RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY C C P SECTION 473(B) AND BECAUSE THE EVIDENCE SHOWS DEFENDANT WAS PROPERLY SERVED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB/CK)
